product_overview: IAMED is a clinical and patient CRM platform for healthcare operators, combining authentication, patient care, scheduling, records, diagnostics, billing, inventory, and administration in a single application. It supports both clinical workflows and operational management across multiple medical and financial modules.
core_goals: Sign in and access the main clinical and administrative workspace
Register and manage patient admissions and appointments
Document clinical encounters, diagnoses, prescriptions, and attachments
Review diagnostic imaging, laboratory results, and radiology reports
Generate billing documents and manage financial records
Track pharmacy inventory, stock movements, and safety events
Run marketing, CRM, hospitalization, occupational health, and portal workflows
Configure users, permissions, password policies, sessions, and access controls
Switch the interface language across supported locales

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can log in with email and password, recover from invalid credentials, and access the main application after successful authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a language from the login screen -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See the main dashboard
Navigate to / -> Fill in email -> Fill in a password with fewer than 4 characters -> Submit login form -> See a password validation message
Navigate to / -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form with invalid credentials -> See an error message and failed attempt count
Navigate to / -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form with invalid credentials five times -> See a lockout message
Navigate to / -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Toggle password visibility -> Observe the password text switch between hidden and visible

features.name: Session Control
features.description: Users can remain signed in, receive inactivity warnings, and end their session from the application.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> See the authenticated header with user and role information
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Remain inactive until the warning appears -> See the session timeout warning modal
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Trigger the session warning modal -> Move the mouse or press a key -> See the warning disappear and the timer reset
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Select logout from the authenticated interface -> Return to the login screen

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: Users can switch the application language from the login screen or authenticated header and immediately see interface text update.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the language selector on the login screen -> Choose English -> See the login text update immediately
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open the language selector in the header -> Choose another supported language -> See the interface text update immediately
Navigate to / -> Choose a language -> Refresh the page -> See the selected language persist

features.name: Patient Admission
features.description: Reception users can register patient information, capture or upload a photo, validate identity data, and detect duplicate records for merging.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open patient admission from the main workspace -> Fill in patient identification fields -> Fill in contact and address details -> Fill in insurance data -> Save the patient -> See the new patient in the list

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open patient admission from the main workspace -> Fill in minor patient data -> Fill in guardian data -> Save the patient -> See the admission recorded with guardian information

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open patient admission from the main workspace -> Fill in patient data -> Capture a webcam photo or upload a patient photo -> Save the patient -> See the photo associated with the record
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open patient admission from the main workspace -> Enter an invalid Paraguay CI document -> Attempt to validate the document -> See a validation failure message

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open patient admission from the main workspace -> Detect a duplicate patient -> Enter the merge PIN -> Merge the records -> See a single consolidated patient record

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.description: Users can create appointments, detect schedule conflicts, manage blocked slots, and place patients on a waitlist.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open appointment scheduling from the main workspace -> Select a date and time slot -> Select a doctor and modality -> Select a patient -> Save the appointment -> See the appointment on the agenda

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open appointment scheduling from the main workspace -> Select a conflicting slot -> Select a patient -> Attempt to save the appointment -> See a conflict warning

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open appointment scheduling from the main workspace -> Select a conflicting slot -> Enter the overbooking PIN -> Save the appointment -> See the appointment scheduled despite the conflict
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open appointment scheduling from the main workspace -> Select a blocked slot -> Add the patient to the waitlist -> See the patient added to the waitlist
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open appointment scheduling from the main workspace -> Select an appointment -> Send a WhatsApp reminder -> See the reminder action completed

features.name: Electronic Health Record
features.description: Clinicians can build a full encounter record with anamnesis, exam findings, SOAP notes, diagnoses, prescriptions, procedures, attachments, electronic signature, and AI-generated clinical summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open the electronic health record from the main workspace -> Fill in anamnesis fields -> Record vital signs -> Write SOAP notes -> Search and select CID-10 diagnoses -> Save the encounter -> See the clinical record added to the patient history

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open the electronic health record from the main workspace -> Add prescribed medications -> Review interaction checking results -> Save the prescription -> See the prescription attached to the encounter

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open the electronic health record from the main workspace -> Request lab and imaging exams -> Record a procedure -> Attach files -> Save the encounter -> See the requested items and attachments in the record
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open the electronic health record from the main workspace -> Generate an AI clinical summary -> See the Dr. IA summary appear
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open the electronic health record from the main workspace -> Sign the document electronically -> See the signed clinical document recorded

features.name: Diagnostic Imaging
features.description: Users can review DICOM studies, adjust the viewer, create radiology reports, and inspect related lab and HL7 information.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open diagnostic imaging from the main workspace -> Select a DICOM study -> See the image open in the viewer
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open diagnostic imaging from the main workspace -> Select a study -> Adjust brightness, contrast, zoom, and rotation -> See the image viewer update
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open diagnostic imaging from the main workspace -> Filter studies by modality -> See the filtered study list

Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open diagnostic imaging from the main workspace -> Open a radiology report editor -> Write a report -> Save the report -> See the report associated with the study
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open diagnostic imaging from the main workspace -> View lab results -> Observe critical value alerts when present

features.name: Electronic Billing
features.description: Finance users can generate DTE billing documents, review KuDE views, download XML, cancel documents, and reconcile payments.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open electronic billing from the main workspace -> Generate a DTE document -> See the document created with XML and CDC data
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open electronic billing from the main workspace -> Open a DTE -> View the KuDE visualization -> See the graphical representation of the document
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open electronic billing from the main workspace -> Open a DTE -> Download the XML file -> See the file download start
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open electronic billing from the main workspace -> Open a DTE -> Cancel the document -> See the status change to canceled
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open electronic billing from the main workspace -> Select a payment gateway -> Reconcile the payment -> See the billing status update to reconciled

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: Finance users can record revenue and expense postings, manage receivables and payables, inspect cash flow, reconcile banks, and create accounting entries.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open financial management from the main workspace -> Create a financial posting for revenue or expense -> See the posting appear in the ledger
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open financial management from the main workspace -> Open accounts payable or receivable -> See the filtered list by status
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open financial management from the main workspace -> Review cash flow projections -> See projected balances and trends
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open financial management from the main workspace -> Perform bank reconciliation -> See the reconciliation reflected in the financial records
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open financial management from the main workspace -> Record an accounting journal entry -> See the entry added to accounting records

features.name: Pharmacy and Inventory
features.description: Pharmacy staff can monitor stocked items, track lots and movements, view expiry alerts, and report safety or quality events.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open pharmacy and inventory from the main workspace -> View pharmacy items with lot control -> See item quantities and lot details
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open pharmacy and inventory from the main workspace -> Record a stock movement as entry, exit, transfer, or dispensing -> See the inventory quantity update
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open pharmacy and inventory from the main workspace -> Perform an inventory count -> See the counted stock reflected in the item records
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open pharmacy and inventory from the main workspace -> Review expiry alerts -> See color-coded alerts for items nearing expiration
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open pharmacy and inventory from the main workspace -> Report an adverse event or quality deviation -> See the report added to the safety log

features.name: CRM and Marketing
features.description: Users can manage campaigns, leads, and survey analysis for marketing and sales workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open CRM and marketing from the main workspace -> Create a marketing campaign -> See the campaign recorded in the list
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open CRM and marketing from the main workspace -> Capture a web form lead -> See the lead added to the sales funnel
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open CRM and marketing from the main workspace -> Move through the lead funnel stages -> See the lead status update
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open CRM and marketing from the main workspace -> Analyze NPS surveys -> See the NPS score and distribution
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open CRM and marketing from the main workspace -> Manage an LGPD opt-out -> See the contact excluded from marketing outreach

features.name: Hospital Management
features.description: Hospital users can review bed status, transfer beds, schedule surgeries, and document hospitalization and nursing workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open hospital management from the main workspace -> Review bed status -> See the color-coded bed map
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open hospital management from the main workspace -> Transfer a patient to another bed -> See the bed assignment update
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open hospital management from the main workspace -> Schedule a surgery -> See the surgery move through its status workflow
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open hospital management from the main workspace -> Complete the surgical checklist -> See the checklist recorded for the case
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open hospital management from the main workspace -> Record medical evolution or nursing notes -> See the hospitalization episode update

features.name: Patient Portal
features.description: Patients can access their portal to book appointments, review prescriptions and results, pay online, start telemedicine, and update their profile.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully as a patient -> Open the patient portal from the main workspace -> Book an appointment online -> See the appointment confirmed
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully as a patient -> Open the patient portal from the main workspace -> View prescriptions -> See the prescription details displayed
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully as a patient -> Open the patient portal from the main workspace -> View exam results -> See the results displayed
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully as a patient -> Open the patient portal from the main workspace -> Make an online payment -> See the payment submission completed
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully as a patient -> Open the patient portal from the main workspace -> Start a telemedicine video call -> See the video consultation begin
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully as a patient -> Open the patient portal from the main workspace -> Update profile information -> See the profile changes saved

features.name: System Administration
features.description: Administrators can manage users, roles, permissions, password rules, lockout settings, active sessions, and login audit logs.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open system administration from the main workspace -> Create a user -> See the user appear in the list
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open system administration from the main workspace -> Edit a user -> See the form load with the selected user's data
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open system administration from the main workspace -> Update a user's active status -> See the status change between active and inactive
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open system administration from the main workspace -> Select a professional in RBAC -> Toggle permissions -> See the permissions update
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open system administration from the main workspace -> Configure password policy settings -> Save the policy -> See the policy confirmation
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open system administration from the main workspace -> Review active sessions or login logs -> See session and audit data displayed

features.name: Occupational Medicine
features.description: Occupational health users can register companies, define work risks, record worker exams, and generate compliance documents.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open occupational medicine from the main workspace -> Register a company and contract -> See the record saved
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open occupational medicine from the main workspace -> Define a workstation and associated risks -> See the risk profile attached
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open occupational medicine from the main workspace -> Record a worker exam -> See the exam added to the list
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open occupational medicine from the main workspace -> Generate a CAL certificate -> See the certificate created
Navigate to / -> Log in successfully -> Open occupational medicine from the main workspace -> Create an MTESS report -> See the compliance report prepared

routes.description: Main SPA containing login screen and all 21 clinical/financial modules rendered via activeSubmodule state
Server-side proxy for Google Gemini AI API calls

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login with email and password via Supabase Auth, with account lockout after 5 failed attempts and session timeout
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
See lockout message after 5 failed attempts

features.name: Patient Admission
features.description: Multi-tab patient admission form with document validation, duplicate detection, and merge workflow
user_interactions: Fill patient identification fields (name, document, birthdate, gender)
Validate Paraguay CI document with check digit
Detect duplicate patients and merge records with PIN

features.name: Appointment Scheduling
features.description: Appointment scheduling with conflict detection, overbooking authorization, and waitlist management

features.name: Electronic Health Record
features.description: Full EHR with anamnesis, physical exam, SOAP notes, CID-10 diagnoses, prescriptions, and AI clinical summary
user_interactions: Fill anamnesis fields (personal/family pathology, habits, allergies, medications)
Create prescriptions with drug interaction checking
Generate AI clinical summary via Dr. IA

features.name: Diagnostic Imaging
features.description: PACS DICOM viewer with brightness/contrast/zoom controls and radiology reports
user_interactions: Filter by modality (RX, TC, RM, US, MG, PET)
Review lab results with critical value alerts

features.name: Electronic Billing
features.description: DTE generation for Paraguay SIFEN with XML output and payment gateway reconciliation
user_interactions: Reconcile payments with gateways (Bancard, Pagopar, Tigo Money)

features.name: Financial Management
features.description: Revenue/expense tracking, accounts payable/receivable, cash flow, and accounting entries

features.name: Pharmacy and Inventory
features.description: Drug items with lot control, stock movements, pharmacovigilance, and expiry alerts
user_interactions: View pharmacy items with lot control
Record stock movements (entry, exit, transfer, dispensing)

features.name: CRM and Marketing
features.description: Marketing campaigns, lead management, sales funnel, and NPS analysis
user_interactions: Create marketing campaigns (WhatsApp, email, SMS, phone)

features.name: Hospital Management
features.description: Bed management, surgery scheduling, and hospitalization episodes

features.name: Patient Portal
features.description: Patient-facing portal with appointment booking, prescriptions, payments, and telemedicine

features.name: System Administration
features.description: User management, RBAC, password policies, 2FA/MFA, and SSO configuration

features.name: Internationalization
features.description: Runtime language switching across 6 languages with persistence in localStorage
user_interactions: Select language from dropdown on login screen

features.name: Occupational Medicine
features.description: ASO exams, companies, contracts, workstations, and MTESS compliance for Paraguay

known_limitations.issue: All data fetching is client-side via Supabase JS client with no server components fetching data
known_limitations.impact: Data is loaded in useEffect hooks, no SSR data fetching, potential performance issues on initial load

known_limitations.issue: Massive single page file (1470 lines) and large component files (up to 3536 lines)
known_limitations.impact: Difficult to maintain, test, and debug due to extreme file sizes

known_limitations.issue: Hardcoded merge PIN (1234) and overbooking PIN (1234)
known_limitations.impact: Security vulnerability - authorization PINs visible in source code

known_limitations.issue: Mock data fallback when Supabase is unreachable
known_limitations.impact: App works without database but shows fake data, could confuse users

known_limitations.issue: No API rate limiting on /api/gemini endpoint
known_limitations.impact: Potential abuse of Gemini API credits
If Supabase write fails, local state is inconsistent with database
Runtime errors crash the entire app without graceful error display

known_limitations.issue: No pagination for patient lists, appointment lists, and logs

known_limitations.impact: AI features will not work without valid API key
Code quality issues may go unnoticed
